name: connect_grokzilla_backend
description: Connect grokzilla.sites backend (grokzilla-hub in artifacts) to the ecosystem: datacenter monitoring, contractor app leads/escrow, claims tools. Make it the central dashboard for monetization tracking. Use dragonscale for any distributed backend logic.

steps.description: Explore /home/nicsins/workdir/artifacts/.grok/grokzillafiles/grokzilla-hub and dragonscale for current backend. Read code for connection points.
Add connectors: to contractor app (leads/credits), claims (fees), datacenter (node status via dragonscale). Use taskmaster for orchestration.
Use no-proof-deployer to prod-deploy updated grokzilla backend if needed. Domain grokzilla.site or sub. Godaddy for DNS.
Build views for revenue: contractor credits, claims 12% fees, datacenter node rentals. Gamma for UI mock, Canva for visuals. Linear for feature tracking.
